use_cases: Interactive product catalog with flip-through pages for e-commerce showcase
Digital portfolio or storybook with animated page transitions
Educational content presentation with chapter-based navigation
Collectible item display with card-like flip animations
Digital magazine or brochure viewer with cover page
ai_summary: An interactive flipbook component that displays content in a realistic book-like format with smooth page-flip animations, drop shadows, and a visible cover. Built with react-pageflip, it supports custom content per page including images and text descriptions. Commonly used for digital catalogs, portfolios, interactive storytelling, and game-related content like collectible cards or character showcases.
